no: Almateria's Restoration Project. Restores cut content from BG2. Install after Unfinished Business per author recommendation.
sum: Restores 12 additional pieces of cut BG2 content not covered by Unfinished Business. Includes restored items, encounters, and quest threads.

ki.description: arestorationp cn:9 (Better Item Import) has REQUIRE_PREDICATE NOT GAME_IS ~bg2ee eet~. Auto-skips on BG2EE/EET since Beamdog added their own item-import solution in patch 1.3.
ki.workaround: Do not include in BG2EE/EET installs. If selected, will silently skip via predicate.

co.no: Restores tent in Trademeet, Kiser bedroom, Yaga-Shura front door, Aran cloakroom jokes, Spellhold summoning book, Planar Sphere trap, Watcher Keep hints. Safe flavor additions

Restores ~20 cut characters (drow cook, Bodhi crypt allies, Gas Spores, Tax Collector) and ~20 dialogues (Deirex, Pelanna, Firkraag taunts, Viconia banter). Minor cosmetic issue with cdtweaks Pause All Dialogues
Restores proper damaged/dying/morale sounds to 1600+ creatures. Signature component — pure data restoration, no gameplay impact
Restores Blessed Bolts, Horn of Kazgaroth, Boots of Phasing/Lightning Speed, Firkraag letter, Am-Si key. Items chosen specifically to not overlap with UB
Restores two cut Wish options: Globe of Blades (WIS>18) and 10,000 GP (WIS<9)
Restores minor ToB XP rewards: Forest of Tethyr heads, Big Metal Unit assembly, Ehlastra XP correction
If Cernd quest resolved peacefully, Deril returns as a lich after 3 days. Adds quest closure for Cernd players
Restores SoA wilderness ogre and ToB bounty hunter encounters. Install BEFORE Quest Pack. Has smart detection for Quest Pack and SCS
Grab-bag: Saradush worldmap icon, distinct ability icons (Enrage, Lay On Hands), better Ranger Tracking text, Saemon monk disguise, Slayer form HP fix. Slayer fix may overlap with MiH SP

co.dep: v18 (auto-skips on BG2EE/EET: REQUIRE_PREDICATE NOT GAME_IS ~bg2ee eet~). Originally older versions had "Restored Bard Stronghold Quests" at cn:9, which was removed.
co.no: Auto-skips on BG2EE/EET via REQUIRE_PREDICATE NOT GAME_IS ~bg2ee eet~. Obsoleted by BG2EE patch 1.3 which added its own item-import solution.
OBSOLETE on BG2EE/EET — tp2 has REQUIRE_PREDICATE NOT GAME_IS ~bg2ee eet~ with message 'Made obsolete by BG2EE patch 1.3'. The Enhanced Edition handles item import natively. Will not install on EET.

v18 (component not present in tp2; legacy entry from older arestorationp version). Restores 6 unused voiced lines by Irenicus, Gaelan, and Imoen in the opening cutscene. Explains why Gaelan knew your location
